name: opencode-self-evaluation
task_prompt: Read the config files in /project and output a summary to /workspace/summary.json
agent_command:
cat /project/.neuroplasticity/rules.json > rules.txt 2>/dev/null || echo '' > rules.txt && /user_home/.opencode/bin/opencode run --dangerously-skip-permissions "$(cat rules.txt)

Analyze /project and save to /workspace/summary.json"

setup_script: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates jq nodejs npm

evaluators.name: Verify JSON Output
script: jq . /workspace/summary.json || (echo 'Output is not valid JSON! DO NOT use markdown blocks!' >&2; exit 1)
